en.text: neuter of ἀλάβαστρος (of uncertain derivation), the name of a stone; properly, an "alabaster" box, i.e. (by extension) a perfume vase (of any material)

senses.gloss_en: neuter of ἀλάβαστρος (of uncertain derivation), the name of a stone; properly, an "alabaster" box, i.e. (by extension) a perfume vase (of any material)
